<?php
require '/wordpress/wp-load.php';
$front = wp_insert_post(array('post_title'=>'Home','post_name'=>'home','post_status'=>'publish','post_type'=>'page'));
update_option('page_on_front', $front);
wp_insert_post(array('post_title'=>'Products','post_name'=>'products','post_status'=>'publish','post_type'=>'page','meta_input'=>array('_wp_page_template'=>'page-products')));
wp_insert_post(array('post_title'=>'News & Intelligence','post_name'=>'news-intelligence','post_status'=>'publish','post_type'=>'page','meta_input'=>array('_wp_page_template'=>'page-news')));
wp_insert_post(array('post_title'=>'Login','post_name'=>'login','post_status'=>'publish','post_type'=>'page','meta_input'=>array('_wp_page_template'=>'page-login')));
wp_insert_post(array('post_title'=>'Account Dashboard','post_name'=>'dashboard','post_status'=>'publish','post_type'=>'page','meta_input'=>array('_wp_page_template'=>'page-dashboard')));
wp_insert_post(array('post_title'=>'Transfers & Bill Pay','post_name'=>'transfers','post_status'=>'publish','post_type'=>'page','meta_input'=>array('_wp_page_template'=>'page-transfers')));
$blog = wp_insert_post(array('post_title'=>'Blog','post_name'=>'blog','post_status'=>'publish','post_type'=>'page'));
update_option('page_for_posts', $blog);
wp_delete_post(2, true);
echo 'Pages created';
?>
